slides.headline: 9:42pm. Burst pipe.
slides.body: Her kitchen's flooding. Your phone's face-down in brick dust. Buzzing.

slides.headline: You're asleep. Fair enough — 11 hours on the tools.

slides.headline: He answered on the second ring.
slides.body: Same-night call-out. She saves his number now. Not yours.
